experiment: Phase 4: Titan V ACR Boot Resolution

strategy_details.name: nouveau-style IMEM+EMEM SEC2 boot
strategy_details.notes: SEC2 Running but queue discovery failed. mb0=0xcafebeef

strategy_details.name: Physical-first SEC2 boot (no instance block)
strategy_details.notes: SEC2 still running after PMC reset

strategy_details.name: System-memory ACR boot (IOMMU DMA)
strategy_details.notes: ACR result: mb0=0xdeada5a5 (ACR failed sentinel). SEC2 executed ACR payload but authentication/WPR2 failed.

strategy_details.name: Hybrid ACR boot (VRAM pages + sysmem data)
Direct FECS boot (bypass ACR)
strategy_details.notes: Cannot bypass ACR on secure Volta

strategy_details.name: ACR mailbox command (live SEC2)
strategy_details.notes: FECS RUNNING momentarily but no ready signal

strategy_details.name: Direct ACR IMEM load (no BL DMA)
Direct host IMEM/DMEM upload (bypass ACR DMA)
strategy_details.notes: FECS HRESET, hardware auth blocks unsigned code

sec2.notes: Hardware-enforced signed execution only. sctl=0x3000 = ACR/HS mode.

fecs.notes: Cannot load unsigned firmware. Must be loaded by ACR via SEC2.

nouveau_traces.diagnosis: Nouveau on Volta does basic device init (PMC, PRIV_RING, PDISP) but CANNOT do authenticated falcon boot. Zero SEC2/ACR/FECS/GPCCS/PMU writes.
nouveau_traces.post_unbind_state: All falcon IMEM/DMEM zeroed. Nouveau cleans up on unbind — parasitic state borrowing impossible.

blockers.primary: SEC2 hardware security (sctl=0x3000) prevents unsigned code execution. ACR payload must be correctly signed and loaded through proper DMA chain.
secondary: WPR2 region setup — unknown correct programming sequence from VFIO host
ACR descriptor patching — mb0=0xdeada5a5 sentinel from strategy 4 suggests ACR desc or WPR layout error
PMU dependency — ACR may need PMU behavior not replicated in VFIO
Memory controller init — FBPA/PFB writes needed for VRAM+WPR access

immediate: Run VM-based reagent captures with nvidia-418/470/535 to get complete SEC2/ACR init sequences
Focus on SEC2 IMEM/DMEM content, WPR2 register programming, DMA descriptor layout
Compare across driver versions to find the 'experienced traveling salesman' common path
strategy_4_refinement: Sysmem ACR is closest to success (SEC2 ran, ACR attempted)
Feed closed-source mmiotrace WPR2 writes into strategy_sysmem
Verify ACR descriptor patch addresses match driver's layout
Check IOMMU DMA mapping aligns with BL DMEM descriptor
k80_validation: K80 sovereign compute validates the full pipeline L1-L9, L11
Once K80 DEVINIT gaps are filled (from reagent traces), compute dispatch will work
K80 success = proof that the pipeline works, minus auth
